name: Windsurf

includes.notes: Light quota to code with agents; unlimited inline edits and Tab completions; limited model availability
Increased quotas; full model availability including OpenAI/Claude/Gemini frontier models; 2-week free trial for new users

overage.notes: UNVERIFIED_OVERAGE: page states 'at API pricing' with no specific per-unit rate or unit type; Cognition sibling Devin charges $2.25/ACU (Core) but windsurf.com does not confirm ACUs as Windsurf's overage unit

includes.notes: Significantly higher quotas than Pro; full model availability including OpenAI/Claude/Gemini frontier models

overage.notes: UNVERIFIED_OVERAGE: page states 'Extra usage at API pricing' with no specific per-unit rate

includes.notes: Pro-level quotas; centralized billing; admin dashboard with analytics; priority support; automated zero data retention

overage.notes: UNVERIFIED_OVERAGE: page states 'Extra usage at API pricing' with no specific per-unit rate

includes.notes: All Teams features; RBAC; SSO + access control; hybrid deployment; highest priority support; dedicated account management; custom terms; contact-sales pricing

verification_override: Base prices: use rendering proxy r.jina.ai/https://windsurf.com/pricing. Current tiers: Free, Pro, Max, Teams, Enterprise. Overage: if page shows specific per-unit rate, use it. If page shows 'at API pricing' without a specific rate, fetch https://devin.ai/pricing — Cognition AI owns both Windsurf and Devin (acquired July 2025) and publishes per-unit rates there. Match overage unit type to what windsurf.com describes (may be acu, request, or token). If neither source yields a rate, keep existing overage data and mark UNVERIFIED_OVERAGE. Feature attribution: the pricing page uses a comparison table with visual markers (checkmarks/dashes) per plan. Web fetch cannot reliably distinguish these — do not add features to plan notes based on the comparison table. Tier-specific features: Teams adds centralized billing, admin dashboard with analytics, priority support, automated zero data retention over Pro. Enterprise adds RBAC, SSO + access control, hybrid deployment, highest priority support, dedicated account management, custom terms over Teams. Previews, deploys, inline edits, and Tab completions are available on all tiers including Free — do not attribute them to specific paid plans.
